source.title: How does the ATLAS locker work?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

primary_sources.anchor_text: The full rewards schedule can be found here

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How does the ATLAS locker work?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
The ATLAS Locker allows you to lock ATLAS tokens to:
Earn daily POLIS rewards
Reduce your Marketplace seller fees
When you request a withdrawal, a 21-day cooldown period starts, during this time, rewards and discounts are paused. After the cooldown ends, you can reclaim your ATLAS.
Start here: govern.staratlas.com/lockers
How It Works – Step by Step
Step 1: Lock ATLAS
Choose the amount of ATLAS you want to lock.
Locking more ATLAS unlocks bigger Marketplace fee discounts.
You’ll start earning daily POLIS rewards automatically.
Step 2: Earn Daily POLIS Rewards
POLIS is distributed daily to lockers based on how much ATLAS you have locked relative to others.
Emissions follow a declining curve over 8 years.
Emission Curve Summary:
Start (2022): 4,320 POLIS/day
End (2030): 2,620 POLIS/day
The full rewards schedule can be found here
Step 3: Get Marketplace Fee Discounts
Your Locker Tier determines your seller fee discount on the marketplace and in Sage Local Marketplace:
Tier
Locked ATLAS
Fee Reduction
Final Fee
DAO Share
0
0%
6.00%
2.00%

10,000
10%

1.80%
2
70,000
15%
5.10%
1.70%
3
560,000
25%

1.50%
4
5,600,000
45%
3.30%
1.10%
5
72,800,000
85%
0.90%
0.30%
How Your POLIS Rewards Are Calculated
Formula:
(Your Locked ATLAS / Total Locked ATLAS) × Daily POLIS Emission
Example:
If 4,000 POLIS are emitted today
And you have 1,000 ATLAS locked out of 1,000,000 total:→ You earn
(1,000 / 1,000,000) × 4,000 = 4 POLIS
Key Locker Terms & Metrics
Circulating Supply: Publicly available ATLAS (excludes vesting & emissions reserves).
Total Supply: Total amount of ATLAS in existence.
Total Locked: Total ATLAS locked by all users.
Next Daily Reward Drop: The total POLIS reward pool for the next emission cycle.
Average Marketplace Fee Reduction:The average fee discount across all lockers—this gives insight into how much sellers are typically saving through ATLAS locking.
How Withdrawal Works
Action
What It Does
Initiate Withdraw
Starts 21-day cooldown ⛔ Rewards & discounts are paused
Halt Withdraw
Cancels cooldown ✅ Resumes rewards & discounts
Reclaim Tokens
After 21 days, unlock and withdraw your ATLAS
